# Create alice.ledgit.eth

## Transaction 1 — Create Subname

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| To | 0xfF7f398d423b6b4354AD436a225840Daa4507ac4 |
| Value | 0 |
| Data |  |

Paste into https://transact.swiss-knife.xyz/send-tx → Connect MetaMask → Send.

## Transaction 2 — Set Text Record (send after TX1 confirms)

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| To | 0x01926FaF6A2B6d618B600266209D6E031850e101 |
| Value | 0 |
| Data |  |

Sets `ledgit.hcs.topic` = `0.0.9219676` on `alice.ledgit.eth`.

## After both confirm

```bash
ledgit verify alice.ledgit.eth
ledgit dashboard alice.ledgit.eth
```

No `LEDGIT_TOPIC_ID` env var needed — resolves via ENS automatically.
